content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_Inventory_MasterData
--drop view v_Inventory_MasterData
as

SELECT          'M3' AS ERP, ML.ITNO, ITDS, ML.WHLO
,               MM.ITCL as BRAND, MF.APPR as [Average Cost]
,               sum(STQT) as [Qty on Hand]
,               sum(REQT) as [Qty on Reserve]
,               sum(ALQT) as [Qty Allocated]
,               sum(SSQT) as [Qty on Safety Stock]
,               sum(QUQT) as [Qty on Inspection]
,               sum(RJQT) as [Qty Rejected]
,               ML.BUYE as [Buyer]
FROM            M3.MITBAL ML
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM on ML.ITNO = MM.ITNO
JOIN            M3.MITFAC MF on ML.ITNO = MF.ITNO AND MF.FACI = 'TLC'
JOIN            M3.MITWHL WH ON ML.WHLO = WH.WHLO
WHERE           ISNULL(STQT,0) + ISNULL(ALQT,0) + ISNULL(REQT,0) + ISNULL(SSQT,0) + ISNULL(QUQT,0) + ISNULL(RJQT,0) <> 0
GROUP BY        ML.ITNO, ML.WHLO, ITDS, itcl, MF.APPR, BUYE


/*
UNION ALL

(
SELECT          'VISUAL' AS ERP, A.ITNO, A.ITDS, A.WHLO, A.LOCATION_ID, A.[Qty on Hand], A.BRAND
,               [Qty on Order (Incoming)]
,               isnull([Qty on Reserve],0) as [Qty on Reserve]
,               A.[Qty on Hand] - ISNULL([Qty on Reserve],0) as [Qty Available]
FROM
(
SELECT          PART_ID AS ITNO, WAREHOUSE_ID AS WHLO, LOCATION_ID as LOCATION_ID, P.DESCRIPTION AS ITDS, SUM(QTY) AS [Qty on Hand], P.USER_1 as BRAND
FROM            ECM.PART_LOCATION PL
JOIN            ECM.PART P on PL.PART_ID = P.ID
GROUP BY        PART_ID, WAREHOUSE_ID, P.DESCRIPTION, LOCATION_ID, p.user_1
HAVING          SUM(QTY) <> 0               
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
select			PART_ID as ITNO, WAREHOUSE_ID AS WHLO, SUM(ORDER_QTY - TOTAL_RECEIVED_QTY) AS [Qty on Order (Incoming)]
from			ECM.PURC_ORDER_LINE
WHERE			LINE_STATUS = 'A'
AND				WAREHOUSE_ID IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY		PART_ID, WAREHOUSE_ID
HAVING			SUM(ORDER_QTY - TOTAL_RECEIVED_QTY) > 0    
) B           ON A.ITNO = B.ITNO and A.WHLO = B.WHLO and A.LOCATION_ID = B.WHLO

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          [Item Number] as ITNO, [Warehouse] as WHLO, SUM(Quantity) as [Qty on Reserve] 
FROM            v_OpenOrdersByStatus
WHERE           ERP = 'Visual'
and             [Qty Status] = '3 - Allocated'
And             [IC Flag] <> 'IC'
GROUP BY        [Item Number], Warehouse
) C             ON A.ITNO = C.ITNO and A.WHLO = C.WHLO and A.LOCATION_ID = C.WHLO
)
*/
